%window-add @0
%sessions-changed
%session-changed $0 cap
%window-renamed @0 a/tmuxctl
%begin 1781832544 353 1

%end 1781832544 357 1
%session-window-changed $0 @0
%unlinked-window-add @1
%window-pane-changed @1 %2
%unlinked-window-renamed @1 fixture
%session-window-changed $0 @0
%unlinked-window-close @1
%exit
